deck.title: Layout as Code
deck.subtitle: From Manual Design to AI-Native Publishing Infrastructure

slides.title: The Problem
slides.headline: AI can generate content fast. Production is still slow.
items: Content creation is no longer the main bottleneck.
Layout work still depends on manual tools and repetitive formatting.
Every ebook, workbook, and slide deck often requires rebuilding the layout from scratch.

slides.title: What Is Layout as Code?
slides.statement: Layout becomes a reusable system instead of a one-time manual design task.
items: Content is described as structured data.
The same source can be reused across multiple formats.

slides.title: Core Architecture
slides.caption: A simple pipeline for turning structured content into publishable documents.

slides.title: Why JSON?
slides.headline: JSON turns content into infrastructure.
items: It can power ebooks, slides, landing pages, and future products.

slides.title: Why Typst?
slides.headline: Typst gives modern layout control with programmable templates.

slides.title: From Layout as Code to Publishing as Code
The Factory Analogy
slides.statement: The goal is not to create one document faster. The goal is to build a machine that can create many assets consistently.

slides.title: The Vision
slides.statement: The future of publishing is not just writing faster. The future is building systems that publish.
slides.footer: Layout as Code -> Publishing as Code -> AI Flywheel

slides.title: json-to-typst-ebook
slides.subtitle: Open-source publishing infrastructure for the AI era.
slides.cta: Build the system. Publish at scale.
